prose.en: Identify a secondary authoritative time source that is in a different geographic region than the primary authoritative time source; and
Synchronize the internal system clocks to the secondary authoritative time source if the primary authoritative time source is unavailable.

guidance.en: It may be necessary to employ geolocation information to determine that the secondary authoritative time source is in a different geographic region.

prose.en: a secondary authoritative time source is identified that is in a different geographic region than the primary authoritative time source;
the internal system clocks are synchronized to the secondary authoritative time source if the primary authoritative time source is unavailable.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
organizational personnel installing, configuring, and/or maintaining the system
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing system time synchronization with secondary authoritative time sources
